verifier.independence_note: This is executor-produced mechanical evidence. It is not independent certification, Griff review, t1-approved, or a pm-verdict/v1 artifact.

sha_binding.head_sha_note: Implementation commit containing the corrected decision packet. Proof and manifest commits follow this commit, so the immutable implementation SHA is retained as the pre-merge review anchor.
sha_binding.merge_sha_note: Pre-merge proof cannot bind an actual merge commit. Governed truth-close must bind the final merge SHA after owner-approved merge.

pnpm_verify.note: Serialized full gate completed on the proof-bearing branch head: static verification, DB smoke, and live T1 proof all passed; the live suite reported one expected stale-provider skip and zero failures.

r_level.command: pnpm exec tsx scripts/ci/r-level-check.ts --base origin/main --head HEAD

runtime_proof.note: T1 live-DB smoke gate was run even though this lane changes only governance analysis and control-plane evidence. All 7 smoke tests passed and cleaned up their test data; the full live T1 proof suite also completed with one expected stale-provider skip and zero failures. This lane performed no production mutation.
